product.name: 玩吗 - 桌游DM
product.description: Board game recommendation and rule explanation app for gatherings, new players, and live referee-style follow-up questions.

notes: Public agent-facing routes exist, but there is currently no separate API key issuance flow for agents.
Human account login now uses email verification codes with browser cookie sessions.
There is still no separate agent token issuance flow or public write-capable user API.

state_model.chat: stateless request/response; caller should send full messages history when continuity matters
state_model.session_persistence: human login uses httpOnly browser session cookies; agent routes remain stateless

preferred_agent_flow: Read /llms.txt or /developers/ for product boundary and route selection
Read /openapi.json or GET /api/chat for request schema hints
Use POST /api/chat for recommendation and rules tasks
Use POST /api/stt when audio needs to be transcribed first
Use GET /api/rag or POST /api/rag only when RAG health or lower-level retrieval access is needed

messages.content: 推荐一个适合 4 人破冰、30 分钟内能讲完规则的桌游

capabilities.title: Handle live referee-style follow-ups
notes: Best results come when the caller includes recent turns or the active game name in messages history.

messages.content: 如果两个人同时拍牌，德国心脏病怎么算？

capabilities.title: Transcribe audio to text
capabilities.output_shape: JSON with text or upstream transcription fields

capabilities.title: Check RAG service health
capabilities.output_shape: JSON health payload from the Python RAG service

capabilities.title: Query the Python RAG service through the proxy
capabilities.output_shape: JSON response from the Python RAG service

capabilities.title: Send a human login verification code
capabilities.output_shape: JSON with masked_email, delivery_mode, and cooldown metadata

capabilities.title: Verify a human login verification code
capabilities.output_shape: JSON with authenticated=true and browser session cookie side effect

capabilities.title: Read the current browser auth session
capabilities.output_shape: JSON with authenticated flag and current email user
